meta.title: A Contrary View of the Proposal To Assign a Neotype Strain for Methanothrix soehngenii
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: Arguments are presented for the rejection of the proposal (D. R. Boone, Int. J. Syst. Bacteriol. 41:588-589, 1991) that the type strain GP6 of Methanosaeta concilii be designated as the neotype strain of Methanothrix soehngenii.
